summary: iter 248 refund/money-trail UX. Backend POST /api/refunds/{id}/complete is solid (4/4 pytest tests pass: happy path + state guard + admin-only + 404). Frontend: Money Trail explainer + 'Payment initiated (quote)' label + Captured label + 'Money refunded' banner (with MoMo 2–3 biz days ETA, NO ticket-invalidated banner) all render correctly on order 688db2d1. Admin refunds page: 'Mark paid out' button shows on approved+manual rows with the correct data-testid; History sub-tab defaults to 'all' filter (chip is active, queue-only chips pending/approved are excluded). ONE FAIL: AdminRefunds approve dialog's 'Approved amount' input is NOT locked — feature #4 was missed by main agent.

ui_bugs.issue: PRD #4 not implemented in source. The Input at /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRefunds.jsx:631–636 lacks `disabled`, `readOnly`, slate-100 background, and the required hint 'Locked by the active refund policy. To grant a different amount, edit the policy schedule first.' Tested live: disabled=null, readonly=null, computed bg=rgb(255,255,255), hint text reads 'Can grant more or less than requested. Capped at order total.' The value IS correctly pre-populated to eligible_amount (7500), so openAction wiring works — only the lock/styling/hint copy is missing.

action_items:
AdminRefunds.jsx ~L631: wrap the Approved-amount Input with `disabled readOnly className='mt-1 bg-slate-100 cursor-not-allowed'` and replace the hint

with 'Locked by the active refund policy. To grant a different amount, edit the policy schedule first.' Keep the existing value/onChange so the approved_amount still posts as eligible_amount.
critical_code_review_comments: refunds.py /complete: gateway_refund_id falls back to refund.get('gateway_refund_id') when proof omitted — fine, but consider rejecting blank proof for non-cash methods to enforce auditability.
refunds.py: admin_notes concatenation strips ' |' edges but could yield ' | newnote' when previous note empty. Minor cosmetic.
AdminRefunds.jsx is now 673 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider extracting the ActionDialog & history sub-tab into their own components.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Only the AdminRefunds approve-dialog lock remains. After main-agent applies the readOnly+disabled+slate-bg+new hint change and rebuilds the vite bundle, re-run a quick playwright assertion against [data-testid='admin-approved-amount'] for `disabled` AND `readonly` attributes, slate-ish bg, and the new hint copy. All other 5 acceptance criteria already verified passing.
rca of the issue:
Main agent updated PRD/spec for feature #4 but did not modify the JSX at line 631. The Input still uses the old freely-editable variant; nothing in the diff added disabled/readOnly props or replaced the hint

. Pure missing-implementation, not a regression.
